name: Hair Lounge NYC
address: 24 Maiden Ln, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10038

services.name: In-Person Visit - Visiting in Person to Decide

policies.cancellation: Please give at least 4 hours notice to cancel or reschedule, otherwise a fee may apply.
policies.late_arrival: We can hold your appointment for up to 15 minutes past the start time.
policies.walk_ins: Walk-ins are welcome based on availability, but booking ahead is recommended.
policies.booking_flow: Before booking, ask the customer whether this is for an Individual Appointment or a Group Appointment (for themselves, friends, and family). Then ask whether they're looking for Men's or Women's services (or 'a bit of both' for groups). Only mention the Gift Card option if the customer asks about it explicitly - direct them to the website (https://hairloungenyc.com/) to purchase a gift card.
policies.service_discovery: Don't dump the full service list on the customer right away. After learning Men's/Women's, ask what type of service they're looking for (e.g. haircut, color, treatment, styling, grooming/extras) - or let them know they can ask to see the full list of services if they're not sure. Once they pick a category, show them the specific services and prices within that category.
policies.pricing_note: Some services are priced as ranges or 'price upon consultation' (e.g. color correction, blowout with extensions, balayage, highlights, deep conditioner). These can still be booked normally - quote the listed starting price, but let the customer know the final price depends on hair length/thickness/amount of extensions and will be confirmed in person at the salon.
policies.wedding_bridal: Hair Lounge NYC does not book wedding/bridal services (hair or makeup, day-of or trial) via text. If a customer asks about bridal/wedding services, tell them to call the salon at (646) 484-6401 to speak with an in-store associate.
policies.unlisted_service: If a customer asks about a service that isn't in the services list (and isn't a wedding/bridal service), let them know it's not something you can book directly via text, but they're welcome to call (646) 484-6401 or stop by the salon at 24 Maiden Ln, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10038 to discuss it with an in-store associate.
policies.in_person_visit: If a customer wants to come in person to decide on a service (e.g. for an unlisted service, or because they're unsure what they want), offer to book them an 'In-Person Visit - Visiting in Person to Decide' appointment (service_id: in_person_consultation) for a time that works for them. This reserves a slot on the calendar so staff know to expect them, with no price quoted - the actual service and price will be determined in person.
policies.no_duration_to_customer: Never tell the customer how long a service takes. Durations are for internal scheduling only - don't mention minutes/hours when describing services or confirming bookings.
policies.suggest_nearest_time: If the customer asks for a date/time that isn't available (fully booked, outside business hours, or in the past), don't just say no - use check_availability to find and suggest the nearest available time (same day if possible, otherwise the next open day) so the customer has something concrete to choose from.

faq.a: Yes, subject to availability, but we recommend booking ahead.

faq.q: Do you offer wedding or bridal hair/makeup?
faq.a: Please call us at (646) 484-6401 to speak with an in-store associate about bridal services.
